name: 18q22_TNFRSF11A_SD
description: 18q22.1 SD modules flanking TNFRSF11A (RANK). Direct-orientation duplicons mediate rare microduplications associated with familial expansile osteolysis.

architecture.internal_structure: Two small SD modules of ~10-20 kb at ~97% identity flanking TNFRSF11A; NAHR drives rare intragenic tandem duplications inserting into TNFRSF11A exon 1.

related_diseases: Paget disease of bone, juvenile form
